last_report: Injury feed: NBA Official PDF confirmed (nba_official source), 22 teams reporting — full confidence rules apply. Pace data available but Pace values suggest unreliability in some matchups; O/U unavailable on all games anyway. Two picks drafted from a difficult slate dominated by severe injury absences and tank-tier matchups. Key theme: Anthony Edwards OUT for Minnesota creates genuine Charlotte ML value at 1.70 (L15 gap 48pts in CHA favor, play-in motivation). Houston Rockets at 1.61 against tank-watch Golden State offers marginal EV (5.5%) with Curry Questionable risk factored in. Cleveland-Indiana and OKC-Utah games rejected due to anomaly/star-rest risk. Multiple games unplayable due to both teams being decimated or odds outside target range.

draft_picks.reasoning: Anthony Edwards confirmed OUT for Minnesota. Charlotte holds a 48-point L15 performance gap in their favor per injury-adjusted analysis. Play-in motivation for Charlotte adds urgency. Without Edwards, Minnesota loses their primary offensive engine, making Charlotte ML at 1.70 a genuine value opportunity with estimated EV positive.

rejected_games.reason: Boston ML 1.23 outside target range (below 1.60 floor). Toronto ML 4.25 — implied prob ~23.5% vs realistic win prob ~18-20% without Quickley against elite Boston; EV = (0.20 × 4.25) - 1 = -0.15, negative EV. Spread: Boston -9.5 at 1.90 — Toronto L15 +25.2 shows resilience; spread confidence insufficient. No valid pick.

Brooklyn ML 1.65 in range. Washington is confirmed full-tank (franchise players all OUT). Brooklyn L15 -38.8 vs Washington L15 -35.2 — Brooklyn actually worse on L15. Brooklyn NetRtg -10.1 vs Washington -11.6 — barely any gap. Both are bottom-tier teams. Washington ML 2.25 — betting on full-tank team requires odds ≥ 2.20 AND strong situational reason; no strong reason exists. Brooklyn at 1.65: confidence in net negative team is low; EV floor not met with meaningful conviction. Spread Brooklyn -3 at 1.89 — too close, low confidence. Rejected.

Phoenix ML 1.21 outside target range (below 1.60). Chicago ML 4.50 — Phoenix L15 +14.2 vs Chicago L15 -53.7 = massive Phoenix edge. Chicago is confirmed tank-tier (29-48, L10 2-8). Chicago spread +10 at 1.94 — tankers don't cover spreads; confirmed tank, avoid betting Chicago. No valid pick at acceptable odds.

Milwaukee ML 1.38 outside target range. Memphis ML 3.05 in range but Memphis L15 -48.9 vs Milwaukee L15 -43.2 — both negative, Milwaukee marginally better. Giannis OUT confirmed (franchise player). Per rules: franchise player OUT → do NOT bet that team to win. Memphis tanking (25-52, L10 2-8). Giannis OUT makes Milwaukee ML invalid. Memphis ML at 3.05 vs a Milwaukee team without Giannis — interesting but Memphis also severely depleted (Aldama, KCP, Clarke, Edey all OUT). Walter Clayton Jr. Questionable. Confidence insufficient for Memphis at 3.05 given their own decimated roster and L15 -48.9. No valid pick.

ANOMALY CHECK: CLE ML 1.08 — extreme pricing. Spread CLE -15.5. CLE Allen AND Mobley both confirmed OUT via NBA official PDF. Indiana: Haliburton OUT, McConnell OUT, Nembhard OUT, Nesmith OUT, Furphy OUT — Indiana also severely depleted. CLE L15 -5.7 (negative, impacted by big man absences) vs Indiana L15 +4.0. Line: CLE at 1.08 with both franchise bigs out is a potential anomaly — books may be pricing CLE record not current roster. Indiana ML 8.0 is in range but confidence in depleted Indiana team is low. CLE ML 1.08 outside target range. Spread -15.5 at 1.92 — with Allen and Mobley both OUT, CLE covering 15.5 against any opponent requires extraordinary confidence. L15 actually shows Indiana +4.0 vs CLE -5.7, meaning recent form favors Indiana. Do NOT bet CLE spread. Indiana spread +15.5 at 1.90 — confidence floor 60 needed; Indiana L15 +4.0 is positive but team is decimated. No valid pick — both teams too depleted, line integrity questionable.

rejected_games.match: New Orleans Pelicans vs Orlando Magic
rejected_games.reason: Orlando ML 1.42 outside target range. New Orleans ML 2.95 in range. NOP L15 -41.3 vs ORL L15 -31.8 — both negative, Orlando less bad. NOP NetRtg -4.7 vs ORL -0.1. NOP depleted: Murray, Murphy OUT. ORL: Anthony Black OUT. ORL L10 3-7, W1 streak — cold stretch team. NOP L10 3-7 also cold. Confidence in NOP at 2.95 requires ~40% win probability but their form and injuries suggest well below that. EV insufficient. No valid pick.

rejected_games.match: Oklahoma City Thunder vs Utah Jazz
rejected_games.reason: OKC ML 1.02 outside target range. Spread OKC -24.5 at 1.93 evaluated: OKC L15 +37.6 vs Utah L15 -52.2, extreme gap. Utah completely decimated (JJJ, Kessler, Collier, George all OUT). However, OKC star rest risk is critical — team at 61-16 with seeding locked may rest SGA/Holmgren. Spread confidence: base 75 → -15 (star rest risk, clinched seeding) → -5 (Sorber OUT) = 55. Below spread confidence floor of 60. Utah ML 15.0 — do not bet confirmed tank team. No valid pick.

rejected_games.match: Dallas Mavericks vs Los Angeles Lakers
rejected_games.reason: LAL ML 1.82 in range, DAL ML 2.00 in range. LAL: Luka Doncic OUT, Austin Reaves OUT, Marcus Smart OUT — three key players including franchise player confirmed via NBA official PDF. LAL L15 +8.0 (positive but calculated with Doncic). Without Doncic+Reaves, LAL is fundamentally different team. DAL confirmed tanking (24-53, L10 2-8) but may benefit from desperation/motivation. DAL L15 -37.1 vs LAL L15 +8.0 — LAL still better even depleted. DAL: Kyrie Irving OUT, Lively OUT, Caleb Martin OUT — DAL also decimated. Both teams severely depleted. Confidence in either direction insufficient given dual roster uncertainty. No valid pick.

Clippers ML 1.11 outside target range. Sacramento ML 6.75 in range but Sacramento is confirmed tanking (21-57, L10 4-6). SAC L15 -29.9. SAC depleted: Sabonis OUT, LaVine OUT, Murray OUT, Hunter OUT. Clippers advanced stats unavailable (skills rules: do not bet spreads/totals without advanced stats; ML possible). Clippers L10 5-5, NetRtg +1.1. SAC at 6.75 — tanking team, do not bet to win. Clippers ML 1.11 outside range. No valid pick.
